title: Lagavulin Matriarch
move_pattern: Starts with Sleep. While Asleep Power is active, repeats Sleep. When Asleep expires (after 3 turns or when woken by damage), switches to: Slash → Disembowel → Slash2 → Soul Siphon → Slash → (repeats).
notes: Starts sleeping with Asleep Power (3 stacks) and Plating (12). Sleep move does nothing while the Asleep Power is active. When HP drops to 50% or lower, eyes open animation triggers. Wake-up sequence triggers when Asleep Power expires. Soul Siphon drains -2 Strength and -2 Dexterity from the player and gains 2 Strength for itself.
